debug_info.goal:
case right.node
α : Type
t₁ : Tree α
x : α
t₂ : Tree α
ihl : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height
ihr : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height
⊢ 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height)

failed_attempts:
calc 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size
        < 1 + (2 ^ t₁.height - 1) + (2 ^ t₂.height - 1) + 1 := by omega
      _ = 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height := by omega
      _ ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
          apply Nat.add_le_add
          · exact Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (le_max_left _ _)
          · exact Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) (le_max_right _ _)
      _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by ring
